tcp-skill.en: Use this skill whenever the user wants an end-to-end workflow for the Transdiagnostic Connectome Project (TCP) dataset, including BIDS validation, multimodal processing of sMRI, rs-fMRI, and dMRI, phenotype extraction, and QC integration. Triggers include:...

wmh-segmentation.en: Use this skill whenever the user wants to perform automated white matter hyperintensity (WMH) segmentation on structural MRI data using the MARS-WMH nnU-Net model. Requires one FLAIR and one T1w NIfTI image (no contrast). Triggers include: 'wmh', 'white mat...
